_note: Rigid mount transforms T_tracker_cam per camera role, MEASURED via Vive+checkerboard eye-in-hand calibration (sim_teleop.calibrate_handeye_vive). translation_m = camera optical center position in the tracker frame; rotation_wxyz = T_tracker_cam orientation (w,x,y,z). parent_tracker_role=null means the camera is standalone (not placed in 3D). Intrinsics live in realsense_cameras.json (camera property, not rig geometry).

left_cam._note: Measured (hand-eye). residual translation std ~[7,3,5]mm, rotation spread ~2.7deg; agrees closely with right_cam (same bracket), so trustworthy. Re-calibrate for a tighter fit if needed.

right_cam._note: Measured (hand-eye). residual translation std ~[2,2,3]mm, rotation spread ~0.9deg.
